title: Effective Questioning — Getting the Best Results from AI
description: Practical guide for staff on how to frame questions to get accurate, useful answers from the Eunoia AI Assistant.
body:
# Effective Questioning — Getting the Best Results from AI

## Why Question Quality Matters

The Eunoia AI Assistant retrieves information from your Knowledge Base using the meaning of your question. A well-formed question increases the chance of retrieving the most relevant documents. A vague or ambiguous question may retrieve loosely related information that leads to an incomplete or misleading answer.

This guide teaches you how to write effective questions so you get accurate, actionable answers the first time.

## The Core Principle: Be Specific

Specificity is the single most important factor in question quality. The more specific your question, the more targeted the assistant's retrieval.

| Vague | Specific |
|---|---|
| "What are the policies?" | "What is the cancellation policy for reservations made within 24 hours?" |
| "How do I handle complaints?" | "What steps should I follow when a guest complains about room cleanliness?" |
| "What do we do about upgrades?" | "When is a complimentary room upgrade appropriate for a VIP guest?" |
| "Tell me about check-in." | "What is the early check-in process for guests arriving before 2:00 PM?" |

## Five Patterns for Better Questions

### 1. Include the Subject and Context

Name who and what the question is about.

- ❌ "What should I do?"
- ✅ "What should I do when a walk-in guest requests a room type that is fully booked?"

### 2. Specify the Scenario

Describe the actual situation you are dealing with, not a general topic.

- ❌ "Complaints"
- ✅ "A guest is at the front desk saying the hot water in their shower has not been working since this morning. What should I offer them?"

### 3. State What You Need

Make clear what kind of answer you want — a step-by-step process, a policy statement, a list of options.

- ❌ "Checkout"
- ✅ "What is the step-by-step checkout process for guests with a folio dispute?"

### 4. Include Relevant Constraints

If the situation has specific parameters, include them — they help the assistant retrieve the right policy.

- ❌ "Room discount"
- ✅ "Can a front desk agent authorize a room discount for a returning guest without manager approval? What is the maximum allowed?"

### 5. Ask One Question at a Time

When you have multiple questions, ask them one at a time for cleaner answers.

- ❌ "What is the cancellation policy and what are the check-out procedures and also how do we handle lost and found?"
- ✅ Ask three separate questions in sequence

## Follow-Up Questions

The AI Assistant supports multi-turn conversations. Use follow-up questions to dig deeper:

- "Tell me more about the goodwill gesture options mentioned."
- "What is the escalation procedure if that fails?"
- "Who has authority to approve that?"
- "Is there an exception for loyalty members?"

## When the Answer Seems Wrong

If an answer seems incomplete or incorrect:

1. **Check the sources cited** — the assistant shows which documents it retrieved. Are those the right documents?
2. **Rephrase the question** — try different wording that captures the same intent
3. **Be more specific** — add more details about the scenario
4. **Ask for the source** — "Which policy document covers this?" can reveal whether the right document is in the Knowledge Base

If you consistently cannot get a good answer on a topic, that topic may not be covered in the Knowledge Base. Flag it to your administrator so the relevant document can be added.

## Question Templates for Common Situations

Here are templates for the most common staff question types:

**Policy lookup:**
> "What is the [property name] policy on [topic]?"

**Procedure guidance:**
> "What are the steps to [action] when [condition]?"

**Guest handling:**
> "A guest is [situation]. What should I do?"

**Escalation guidance:**
> "When should I escalate a [type] issue to a manager?"

**Authorization check:**
> "Am I authorized to [action] without manager approval?"

**Pricing and offers:**
> "What [discount/upgrade/goodwill gesture] can I offer a guest who [situation]?"

## What Not to Ask

Certain questions are outside the AI Assistant's capabilities:

- **Real-time availability**: "Is Room 412 available tonight?" — The assistant cannot access your PMS
- **Live pricing**: "What is the current rate for a suite?" — Use your booking system for live rates
- **Guest account details**: "What charges are on Mr. Ahmed's folio?" — Use your PMS
- **Actions**: "Book a taxi for the guest in Room 302" — The assistant cannot take actions on your behalf
- **External information**: "What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?" — Use a weather application

For these, use the appropriate property management system, booking engine, or direct communication channel.

## Building Your Question Skills

Effective AI questioning is a skill that improves with practice. Track your experience:

- When you get a great answer, note what made the question work
- When you get a poor answer, try rephrasing and note what worked better
- Share effective question patterns with your colleagues
- Suggest Knowledge Base additions when common questions lack good answers

The staff who get the most value from the AI Assistant are those who invest a few minutes in learning to ask well.
